benefits of becoming an ebixcash agent:
1. Offer online recharge for many services such as telecom, broadband, entertainment, TV/DTH, ticketing for Railways/Bus/airlines and more.
2. Digitization and availability of all transactional records anytime from anywhere.
3. Source of earning income without the need of physical outlet.
4. Offer Service from a user friendly online portal.
5. No investment in physical inventory.
what are bpo services: EbixCash Global Services Pvt. Ltd offers BPO services such as customer retention and experience solutions across India through various contact call centers including inbound/outbound, email, chat, social media, feet on street, and last mile delivery services. They also provide hiring, onboarding, payroll and human resources help desk services, IT, and digital transformation services like knowledge management, application development, and infrastructure management.
why ebixcash?: Benefits of becoming an EbixCash Agent include digitization and availability of transactional records anytime from anywhere, no investment in physical inventory, offering online recharge for various services across different industries including banking, telecom, insurance etc., being compliant with government laws and economic policies. Additionally, becoming an EbixCash Agent involves maintaining accounts in a true and fair manner as per company practices.
what are payment solutions: Ebix Payment Services Pvt. Ltd.'s Foreign Exchange (Forex) Money Transfer, Gift & Prepaid Card IRCTC Rail Ticketing POS Solutions Micro ATMs Bill Payment & Recharge and Aadhaar Enabled Banking services like Cash Withdrawal - Deposit are part of their payment solutions.
